## Problem Statement

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the problem clearly. -->
<!-- e.g. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like clearly. What should it look like? How should it work? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already considered. -->

## API / Interface Sketch (optional)

<!-- If relevant, sketch out what the API or props might look like: -->

```tsx
<Timeline
  myNewProp={value}
/>
```

## Additional Context

<!-- Any screenshots, mockups, or links to similar features in other libraries. -->
